text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm, next is "one-on-one races." Ohhh, I didn't know they put on these
kinds of shows in past festivals.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I thought I'd be able to figure out what the Fleetfoot Festival means
to me by learning more about it, but...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Forgive me for interrupting your reading, but can I make a
suggestion?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is only a personal opinion, but I recommend reading the letter
excerpt on page fifty-three.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Page fifty-three?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"After claiming the Satsuki Sho, I was named the Umamusume who
dashed toward the stars. But at the Derby, I froze in front of a big
crowd and failed miserably."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"At the Kikuka Sho, I tripped on the rough turf, missing my chance to
win once again. Even still, my fans chose me to run in the Arima
Kinen."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"I vowed under the light of the Fleetfoot Festival. I would not lose. I
absolutely, definitely, certainly would not lose."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"I was willing to risk it all going into that race. Looking back, I think
that was a necessary ritual for me at the time."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ritual...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Late autumn... A season full of Umamusume burning bright with
passion and determination. Have you ever wondered why the
Fleetfoot Festival is held then?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For those running in the forefront, the festival is a meaningful
milestone. A time their determination is renewed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Curren is determined to fulfil her role as a mascot. For Yukino,
festivals themselves are important to her.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (So what about me? What am I dancing for?)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(If I don't want to be a doll forever, I've got to think of a way to pull
the strings myself.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I... I want to carve my own path! I want to show my dedication as a
racing Umamusume with this ritual!

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text: Aaand stop! Not bad, not bad!

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text:
City, you've made a remarkable improvement! Not only are your
moves beautiful, but you have a self-assured charm about you that I
can't take my eyes off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I should say... I'm sorry I wasn't giving it my all until now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I've made up my mind. I promise, I'm going to do this right!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It's like City's unlocked a new power! Guess I can't afford to sit
back either!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Uh, Yukino? Heeey! You okay? You haven't blinked in a while!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What?! Uh, y-yes?! I...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sorry... It's just... City is so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume continues practicing diligently over the next few
days of the camp...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Okay... It's look'n a lot better now. We're going back tomorrow, so I
better start gett'n my stuff together.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
...The training camp's already end'n... Then when we get back to the
academy, we're perform'n straight after.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (But I'm not sure if I'm good enough for it yet...)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yukino! Yukinooo! It's an emergency! Come to the community hall
right now!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wha—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ooh, the costumes! That means they arrived, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ♪ The URA made brand-new costumes for us all! And it's not just
us dancers—the archers get some too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: They're all sooooo so cute! Come on, let's go try them on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wah! Wait for me, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(New costumes... Putt'n me aside, I bet they're gonna look so spiffy
on Curren and City!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (So... glam'rous...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's comfortable to move in. I think the length should be good
like this. Oh, about the shoes...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (City... City's... so beautiful...)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (She's so beautiful... too beautiful.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, Yukino! Your costume's here too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They wanna see how they all look together, so put yours on so we can
line up.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: ...I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Huh? Yukino? What's wrong? Your costume is back there with
City.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Curren... C-Curren, please! I'm begg'n you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Swap with me for the center part!
